Title: Chrome Desktop - Full Flow
Preconditions: Chrome latest version installed; desktop resolution (1920x1080); {{FRONT_URL}} accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] homepage fully loaded
[ACT] run Smoke Tests SMK-001 through SMK-012 as sub-flow
[ACT] initiate BOPIS flow: add item to cart, select pickup option, choose store
[WAIT] BOPIS selection confirmed
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/search?q=product
[WAIT] search results visible
[ACT] proceed through checkout to order confirmation
[WAIT] order confirmation page displayed
Assertions:
[DOM] all smoke test assertions pass (SMK-001 through SMK-012)
[DOM] BOPIS store picker displays correctly and selection is confirmed
[DOM] search results render with correct layout and product cards
[DOM] checkout completes and order confirmation number visible
[STATE] no visual layout breaks or overlapping elements
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError, ReferenceError, or uncaught exceptions throughout flow
[NETWORK] all XHR/fetch requests return 2xx; no 4xx or 5xx errors

Failure_Signals: JS error in browser console; layout broken or overflow at any viewport; payment iframe unresponsive; spinner stuck >10s on any page
Cleanup: Remove test order and cart items via admin if environment requires cleanup

Title: Cross-Browser - Visual Consistency
Preconditions: Chrome, Firefox, Safari (macOS), and Edge all installed and accessible; same test account credentials; {{FRONT_URL}} accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} homepage in Chrome — take reference screenshot
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} homepage in Firefox — take screenshot
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} homepage in Safari (macOS) — take screenshot
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} homepage in Edge — take screenshot
[ASSERT] compare screenshots: fonts, spacing, colors, button styles, icon rendering
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog page in each browser — repeat screenshot comparison
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}} product detail page in each browser — repeat comparison
[ASSERT] document any visual differences found
Assertions:
[DOM] fonts render consistently across browsers — no fallback fonts visible in Firefox or Safari
[DOM] button borders, padding, and border-radius consistent
[DOM] color values render identically (hex colors, not system defaults)
[DOM] icon and image rendering consistent — no blurry images on Retina/HiDPI in Chrome/Edge
[STATE] minor acceptable differences documented; no major layout or color breaks
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no browser-specific CSS property warnings that indicate unprefixed property fallbacks failing
[NETWORK] same assets loaded in all browsers (no browser-specific asset routing)
Failure_Signals: layout broken or overflow at any viewport; major color difference (not minor gamma); fonts falling back to system serif in any browser; JS error in browser console; missing UI sections in any browser
